## Legal Clarity & Protection

### What This Fork Is

✅ **A reference copy** maintained for internal reference and evaluation purposes  
✅ **An unmodified mirror** of the upstream repository (in most cases)  
✅ **Fully attributed** to the original authors and maintainers  
✅ **Licensed under the original terms** — we claim no separate ownership  

### What This Fork Is NOT

❌ **A derivative work** (unless explicitly documented in CHANGES.md)  
❌ **A claim of copyright ownership** over original content  
❌ **A redistribution with modifications** without clear attribution  
❌ **Our intellectual property** — all rights remain with the original authors

## Liability & Copyright

## How to Use This Fork Responsibly

1. **Always link back** to the original repository: [github.com/{{ORIGINAL_AUTHOR}}/{{ORIGINAL_REPO}}](https://github.com/{{ORIGINAL_AUTHOR}}/{{ORIGINAL_REPO}})
2. **Respect the original license** — do not circumvent its terms
3. **Document any modifications** in a CHANGES.md file (if modifications exist)
4. **Do not redistribute** without proper attribution to original authors
5. **Check upstream** regularly for important updates or security fixes
